Types

C_sharpNodeKind = enum
  c_sharpDeclaration,       ## _declaration
  c_sharpExpression,        ## _expression
  c_sharpStatement,         ## _statement
  c_sharpType,              ## _type

  c_sharpDoublePipeTok,     ## ||
  c_sharpRCurlyTok,         ## }
  c_sharpTildeTok,          ## ~
  c_sharpSyntaxError         ## Tree-sitter parser syntax error
C_sharpExternalTok = enum
  c_sharpExtern_preproc_directive_end ## _preproc_directive_end
C_sharpNode = distinct TSNode
C_sharpParser = distinct PtsParser

Procs

proc kind(node: C_sharpNode): C_sharpNodeKind {...}{.noSideEffect,
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
proc tsNodeType(node: C_sharpNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newC_sharpParser(): C_sharpParser {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc parseString(parser: C_sharpParser; str: string): C_sharpNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc parseC_sharpString(str: string): C_sharpNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc isNil(node: C_sharpNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc treeRepr(mainNode: C_sharpNode; instr: string; withUnnamed: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

    raises: [], tags: [].}

func childCount(node: C_sharpNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}

func startPoint(node: C_sharpNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endPoint(node: C_sharpNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startLine(node: C_sharpNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endLine(node: C_sharpNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startColumn(node: C_sharpNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endColumn(node: C_sharpNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func childByFieldName(self: C_sharpNode; fieldName: string; fieldNameLength: int): TSNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

Iterators

iterator items(node: C_sharpNode; withUnnamed: bool = false): C_sharpNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

Made with Nim. Generated: 2021-03-08 12:26:06 UTC
